strategy: Download each immutable version URL, restrict redirects to recorded origins, verify the repository SHA-256, extract without unsafe archive paths into a retained root, verify the executable, then register that root with the fully qualified backend using offline mise link.
notes: Node 24.18.0 is the reviewed LTS and satisfies pnpm 11.13.1's Node >=22.13 requirement.
pnpm is independently owned; Corepack must not activate a second pnpm owner.
The direct preverification strategy is mandatory because Aqua metadata does not enforce the repository digest for every selected tool.
OpenCode, opencode-openai-codex-auth, and Vite+ are outside this manifest by design.
Omarchy retains native ownership; Stage 5 does not install this generic/WSL personal suite there.

omarchy_owners.owner: host-owned; no Omarchy v3.8.3 baseline owner
omarchy_owners.evidence: absent from the pinned base package and npx inventories
